[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up photo shows a small child looking toward the camera while holding up a hand in an indoor setting.

Main Subject:
A young child with very short light hair leans forward toward the camera, with a neutral-to-mild expression and eyes directed downward toward the camera area. The child’s mouth is slightly open, and one hand is raised near the center of the image, with fingers extended. The child wears a beige or tan long-sleeved top and a yellow bib-like garment with a simple line illustration on the front.

Setting:
The scene appears indoors with soft, warm lighting. In the background there are blurred household items and furniture, including stacked or patterned items on the right side of the image, and a vertical structure with hanging elements on the left side.

Visual Details:
The camera is close and slightly angled downward, creating a tight crop of the child’s face and upper body. The child’s skin is light, and the lighting highlights the forehead and cheeks. The bib is bright yellow and contrasts with the tan top. The background is out of focus, with muted colors and a warm tone throughout.

Visible Text:
@abcde

Practical Summary:
The image shows a close-up of a child in a yellow bib and tan top, with one hand raised toward the camera. The background is softly blurred, suggesting an indoor environment.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
